---
title: "Treibhausgas-Emissionen nach Gemeinden ab 1990"
author: "OGD-Koordinationsstelle Kanton Thurgau"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Open Government Data, provided by **Canton Thurgau**
*Autogenerated R starter code for dataset with the identifier* **dbu-afu-23**


# **Treibhausgas-Emissionen nach Gemeinden ab 1990**

[Link to dataset on data.tg.ch](https://data.tg.ch/explore/dataset/dbu-afu-23/information/)

## Description

<p><p>Der Datensatz enthält die Treibhausgas-Emissionen für die Politischen Gemeinden des Kantons Thurgau nach Sektoren ab dem Jahr 1990.</p><p>Weitere Informationen zu den zugrundeliegenden Daten und der Methodik finden Sie <a href='https://www.zh.ch/content/dam/zhweb/bilder-dokumente/themen/umwelt-tiere/luft-strahlung/daten---karten/emissionsbilanzen_ostuft_submission_2025.pdf' target='_blank'>hier</a>.</p><p>Hinweis zum Datenstand: Die Grundlagedaten werden regelmässig aktualisiert und entsprechen jeweils dem im Datensatz angegebenen Datenstand. </p><p></p><p>Datenquelle: Amt für Umwelt Kanton Thurgau</p></p><p></p><p>Datenquelle: Amt für Umwelt Kanton Thurgau</p>

## Metadata

- **Issued**                   : 
- **Modified**                 : 2026-03-30 14:25:47
- **Rights**                   : CC BY 4.0
- **Keywords**                 : treibhausgase, gebäude, kehrichtverbrennung, abfall, landwirtschaft, energie, synthetische gase

## Load Packages

Every dataset (csv and geodata) on [data.tg.ch](https://data.tg.ch/pages/start/) can be retrieved with the **tgAPI** package. You can download it via [GitHub](https://github.com/ogdtg/tgAPI). Please note that the package has some dependencies, which can result in a lengthy installation process. Therefore, we do not recommend installing the package directly in Google Colab. However, if you intend to run this code on your local machine, we strongly recommend installing the tgAPI package.

```{r}
library(httr)
library(jsonlite)
library(dplyr)
# library(remotes)
# remotes::install.github("ogdtg/tgAPI")

```


## Download Data


```{r}
# Download the Dataset via API
res <- httr::GET("https://data.tg.ch/api/explore/v2.0/catalog/datasets/dbu-afu-23/exports/json")
data <- res$content %>%
  rawToChar() %>%
  jsonlite::fromJSON()

# Use tgAPI
# data <- tgAPI::get_dataset("dbu-afu-23")

head(data)

```


## Explore Metadata

```{r}

res <- httr::GET("https://data.tg.ch/api/explore/v2.0/catalog/datasets/dbu-afu-23")
metadata <- res$content %>%
  rawToChar() %>%
  jsonlite::fromJSON()

# Fields name
cat("\nFields name")
metadata$dataset$fields$name

# Fields description
cat("\nFields description")
metadata$dataset$fields$description

# Fields data type
cat("\nFields data type")
metadata$dataset$fields$type

```


## Analyze data

```{r}

# Look at the dataset and its structure
summary(data)

```


## Continue your code here...


```{r}
# Do some data magic with R
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Questions about the data?

Contact us via [Mail](mailto:ogd@tg.ch) or visit our [GitHub presence](https://github.com/ogdtg)


------------------------------------------------------------------------

OGD-Koordinationsstelle Kanton Thurgau | Grabenstrasse 8 | 8510 Frauenfeld
